message:
fix(tests): fix e2e extension directory isolation and add property tests for theme paths, validation classification, and source content analysis

Three test file changes addressing a real test bug and adding new proptest
coverage for extension validation and theme handling:

tests/e2e_extension_registration.rs — bug fix:
- Move ext_a.mjs and ext_b.mjs from a shared "extensions/" directory into
  separate "ext_a/" and "ext_b/" directories to prevent
  discover_extensions_dir_entries from auto-bundling sibling files under a
  single extension_id, which caused a command-name collision when loading
  the second extension spec. Updates record_artifact paths to match.

tests/e2e_library_integration.rs — new property tests:
- prop_theme_path_detects_json_suffix: verifies looks_like_theme_path
  returns true for any stem + ".json" suffix with optional whitespace
- prop_theme_path_detects_directory_separators: verifies path detection
  for forward-slash and backslash separators between name segments
- prop_plain_theme_names_are_not_treated_as_paths: verifies simple
  alphanumeric theme names (no dots, no slashes) return false
- prop_builtin_theme_serde_and_glamour_mapping: verifies dark/light/
  solarized themes survive JSON roundtrip and produce correct glamour
  style config mappings (document color, link color, code color)

tests/extension_validation.rs — new property tests:
- prop_canonical_id_from_npm_trims_and_lowercases: verifies npm
  canonical IDs always start with "npm:" and lowercase the input
- prop_normalize_github_repo_strips_dot_git_and_whitespace: verifies
  .git suffix removal, whitespace trimming, and lowercasing
- prop_classify_true_extension_when_import_plus_export_or_registration:
  verifies TrueExtension classification when has_api_import is true and
  either has_export_default or registrations are present
- prop_classify_unknown_requires_no_signals: verifies Unknown when all
  evidence signals are absent
- prop_classify_source_content_registration_signal_promotes_true_extension:
  verifies that source content containing any of the 6 registration
  methods (registerTool, registerCommand, etc.) is classified as
  TrueExtension with the method name appearing in evidence.registrations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
